title: JJ'S CONSTRUCTION THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: KLAMATH WORKS JJ'S CONSTRUCTION THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Manages a mattress recycling and repurposing program. Provides furniture and household items upcycling. 1930 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 976013370 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 591-8357 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 591-8357 Sam Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for an appointment or more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Russian AREA SERVED: Klamath County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Basin Transit Service Mainline #1 bus stop located at S 6th and Owens Streets Services: Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Mattress Donation Programs Recycling Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - JOB CONNECTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment.
